records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, you reek of alcohol...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oi, you still haven't managed to kick your drinking habit, have you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oi, you still haven't managed to kick your drinking habit, have you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oi, you still haven't managed to kick your drinking habit, have you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Blimey. Mum must be so happy watching over you in heaven.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Blimey. Mum must be so happy watching over you in heaven.

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Scoff!* You're doing drugs now, too?
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Scoff!* You're doing drugs now, too?
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Scoff!* You're doing drugs now, too?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Since I was a kid, I always knew that you were a piece of trash.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Since I was a kid, I always knew that you were a piece of trash.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Since I was a kid, I always knew that you were a piece of trash.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The only reason why I'm sending you money every month is because of mum's will.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The only reason why I'm sending you money every month is because of mum's will.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The only reason why I'm sending you money every month is because of mum's will.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She asked me to forgive you and take care of you...
records.m_Talk_DEU: She asked me to forgive you and take care of you...
records.m_Talk_FRA: She asked me to forgive you and take care of you...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Answer me, you deadbeat dad!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Answer me, you deadbeat dad!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Answer me, you deadbeat dad!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is this what you were doing with the money I've been sending you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is this what you were doing with the money I've been sending you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is this what you were doing with the money I've been sending you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...*Cough, Cough!*
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...*Cough, Cough!*
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...*Cough, Cough!*

records.m_Talk_ENG: Errhm, you've become quite famous, haven't you, Roy?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Errhm, you've become quite famous, haven't you, Roy?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Errhm, you've become quite famous, haven't you, Roy?

records.m_Talk_ENG: So... are you thinking of quitting the Institution and becoming a Gauntlet player?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So... are you thinking of quitting the Institution and becoming a Gauntlet player?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So... are you thinking of quitting the Institution and becoming a Gauntlet player?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Keke... That's not that bad. Street fights are your thing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Keke... That's not that bad. Street fights are your thing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Keke... That's not that bad. Street fights are your thing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Cough!* *Cough!* <color=#ffd34c>Prydwen</color> isn't a place... for a bloke like you anyway.
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Cough!* *Cough!* <color=#ffd34c>Prydwen</color> isn't a place... for a bloke like you anyway.
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Cough!* *Cough!* <color=#ffd34c>Prydwen</color> isn't a place... for a bloke like you anyway.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
You're not qualified to take over
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
You're not qualified to take over
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
You're not qualified to take over

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shut it! What the hell do you think you're doing?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shut it! What the hell do you think you're doing?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shut it! What the hell do you think you're doing?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Think you can parent me now? Why do you care what I do, huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Think you can parent me now? Why do you care what I do, huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Think you can parent me now? Why do you care what I do, huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, forget about it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, forget about it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, forget about it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I didn't come here to pick a fight with you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I didn't come here to pick a fight with you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I didn't come here to pick a fight with you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I just want to ask you one question.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I just want to ask you one question.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I just want to ask you one question.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I heard you were also a <color=#ffd34c>member</color> of Prydwen.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I heard you were also a <color=#ffd34c>member</color> of Prydwen.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I heard you were also a <color=#ffd34c>member</color> of Prydwen.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did Thaddeus say that? That prick...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did Thaddeus say that? That prick...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did Thaddeus say that? That prick...

records.m_Talk_ENG: What the hell did you do? And what do they mean by you owing the Institution?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What the hell did you do? And what do they mean by you owing the Institution?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What the hell did you do? And what do they mean by you owing the Institution?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You didn't... betray the Institution, did you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You didn't... betray the Institution, did you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You didn't... betray the Institution, did you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shut up! I said, shut up, Roy Burnett!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shut up! I said, shut up, Roy Burnett!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shut up! I said, shut up, Roy Burnett!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What does a kid like you know, huh?! None of that was my fault!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What does a kid like you know, huh?! None of that was my fault!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What does a kid like you know, huh?! None of that was my fault!

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I knew it would end like that! I'd...! I'd...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I knew it would end like that! I'd...! I'd...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I knew it would end like that! I'd...! I'd...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Gah...! *Cough!* *Cough!*
records.m_Talk_DEU: Gah...! *Cough!* *Cough!*
records.m_Talk_FRA: Gah...! *Cough!* *Cough!*

records.m_Talk_ENG: Your fault?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Your fault?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Your fault?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Get
8g Get out... of my sight.
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Get
8g Get out... of my sight.
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Get
8g Get out... of my sight.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're nothing but the Institution's hound... You'll never believe a word I say!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're nothing but the Institution's hound... You'll never believe a word I say!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're nothing but the Institution's hound... You'll never believe a word I say!

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you're that curious to know, go ask that tosser, Thaddeus Morgan.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you're that curious to know, go ask that tosser, Thaddeus Morgan.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you're that curious to know, go ask that tosser, Thaddeus Morgan.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Sure, whatever.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Sure, whatever.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Sure, whatever.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I wasn't expecting to get a straight answer from you, anyway.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I wasn't expecting to get a straight answer from you, anyway.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I wasn't expecting to get a straight answer from you, anyway.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Take this and piss off, you deadbeat dad.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Take this and piss off, you deadbeat dad.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Take this and piss off, you deadbeat dad.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Use that money to get treatment, or to shoot up drugs and overdose. I don't give a crap anymore.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Use that money to get treatment, or to shoot up drugs and overdose. I don't give a crap anymore.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Use that money to get treatment, or to shoot up drugs and overdose. I don't give a crap anymore.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Also... this is the last bit of consideration I'm offering you as your son.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Also... this is the last bit of consideration I'm offering you as your son.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Also... this is the last bit of consideration I'm offering you as your son.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Get outta here, you stupid boy!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Get outta here, you stupid boy!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Get outta here, you stupid boy!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You think you're getting some special treatment from the Institution?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You think you're getting some special treatment from the Institution?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You think you're getting some special treatment from the Institution?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mark my words! You'll end up exactly like your grandfather, and they will bleed you dry before throwing you away!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mark my words! You'll end up exactly like your grandfather, and they will bleed you dry before throwing you away!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mark my words! You'll end up exactly like your grandfather, and they will bleed you dry before throwing you away!

records.m_Talk_ENG: With nothing in return for your services...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: With nothing in return for your services...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: With nothing in return for your services...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Blimey. The Institution is always like this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Blimey. The Institution is always like this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Blimey. The Institution is always like this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Although I might be from a dysfunctional family, is this what you call being gentlemanly? Snooping around in other people's private lives?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Although I might be from a dysfunctional family, is this what you call being gentlemanly? Snooping around in other people's private lives?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Although I might be from a dysfunctional family, is this what you call being gentlemanly? Snooping around in other people's private lives?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You can stop hiding now, Morgan.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You can stop hiding now, Morgan.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You can stop hiding now, Morgan.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hah hah, you got me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hah hah, you got me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hah hah, you got me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: When did you notice I was there? Looks like your senses have gotten keener, Champion Burnett.
records.m_Talk_DEU: When did you notice I was there? Looks like your senses have gotten keener, Champion Burnett.
records.m_Talk_FRA: When did you notice I was there? Looks like your senses have gotten keener, Champion Burnett.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shut up. We worked together long enough for me to notice your presence.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shut up. We worked together long enough for me to notice your presence.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shut up. We worked together long enough for me to notice your presence.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And what's with you calling me "Champion Burnett"?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And what's with you calling me "Champion Burnett"?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And what's with you calling me "Champion Burnett"?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hah hah! It's because my proud disciple just won the Gauntlet League!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hah hah! It's because my proud disciple just won the Gauntlet League!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hah hah! It's because my proud disciple just won the Gauntlet League!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Although it was a shame that you got injured by Ozymandias and had to retire during the match.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Although it was a shame that you got injured by Ozymandias and had to retire during the match.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Although it was a shame that you got injured by Ozymandias and had to retire during the match.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's a real shame, indeed... If it were me...
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's a real shame, indeed... If it were me...
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's a real shame, indeed... If it were me...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I would've avoided her attack like this!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I would've avoided her attack like this!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I would've avoided her attack like this!

records.m_Talk_ENG: And this!
records.m_Talk_DEU: And this!
records.m_Talk_FRA: And this!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You didn't follow me just to talk gibberish, did you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You didn't follow me just to talk gibberish, did you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You didn't follow me just to talk gibberish, did you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not in a good mood, so cut the crap and get to the point.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not in a good mood, so cut the crap and get to the point.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not in a good mood, so cut the crap and get to the point.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hah hah. How rude of you, young man.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hah hah. How rude of you, young man.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hah hah. How rude of you, young man.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Or do you want to me guess?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Or do you want to me guess?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Or do you want to me guess?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Am I also under <color=#ffd34c>special surveillance</color> by the Institution?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Am I also under <color=#ffd34c>special surveillance</color> by the Institution?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Am I also under <color=#ffd34c>special surveillance</color> by the Institution?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know what kind of trouble my old man caused, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know what kind of trouble my old man caused, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know what kind of trouble my old man caused, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: if he really did betray the Institution, then they would not want me to contact him.
records.m_Talk_DEU: if he really did betray the Institution, then they would not want me to contact him.
records.m_Talk_FRA: if he really did betray the Institution, then they would not want me to contact him.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Isn't that right, Thaddeus Morgan?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Isn't that right, Thaddeus Morgan?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Isn't that right, Thaddeus Morgan?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aren't you quick-witted? Yes, I won't deny it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aren't you quick-witted? Yes, I won't deny it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aren't you quick-witted? Yes, I won't deny it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Institution is both monitoring and educating you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Institution is both monitoring and educating you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Institution is both monitoring and educating you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Reason being that, to us, <color=#ffd34c>Burnetts</color> are <color=#ffd34c>special</color> beings.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Reason being that, to us, <color=#ffd34c>Burnetts</color> are <color=#ffd34c>special</color> beings.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Reason being that, to us, <color=#ffd34c>Burnetts</color> are <color=#ffd34c>special</color> beings.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And with that exceptionality follows great <color=#ffd34c>responsibility</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And with that exceptionality follows great <color=#ffd34c>responsibility</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And with that exceptionality follows great <color=#ffd34c>responsibility</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: However, the Institution has not determined if you are worthy of that responsibility yet.
records.m_Talk_DEU: However, the Institution has not determined if you are worthy of that responsibility yet.
records.m_Talk_FRA: However, the Institution has not determined if you are worthy of that responsibility yet.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Responsibility this, responsibility that... I'm so sick of that word.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Responsibility this, responsibility that... I'm so sick of that word.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Responsibility this, responsibility that... I'm so sick of that word.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Institution is always like that. What exactly am I to you all?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Institution is always like that. What exactly am I to you all?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Institution is always like that. What exactly am I to you all?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You've never told me what kind of person Grandfather was, or what my dad did to the Institution...
records.m_Talk_DEU: You've never told me what kind of person Grandfather was, or what my dad did to the Institution...
records.m_Talk_FRA: You've never told me what kind of person Grandfather was, or what my dad did to the Institution...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But you just want me to take responsibility for it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But you just want me to take responsibility for it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But you just want me to take responsibility for it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What do I have to do to win your trust, huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What do I have to do to win your trust, huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What do I have to do to win your trust, huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It seems you've hit late puberty, kid Burnett.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It seems you've hit late puberty, kid Burnett.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It seems you've hit late puberty, kid Burnett.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I understand. I too was frustrated with the Institution once.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I understand. I too was frustrated with the Institution once.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I understand. I too was frustrated with the Institution once.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, allow me to make you a proposition.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, allow me to make you a proposition.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, allow me to make you a proposition.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...A proposition?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...A proposition?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...A proposition?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sir, the preparations are complete.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sir, the preparations are complete.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sir, the preparations are complete.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Agent Burnett is waiting for you in Training room No. 4.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Agent Burnett is waiting for you in Training room No. 4.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Agent Burnett is waiting for you in Training room No. 4.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Phew.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Phew.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Phew.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Very well. Tell kid Burnett that I'll be there soon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Very well. Tell kid Burnett that I'll be there soon.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Very well. Tell kid Burnett that I'll be there soon.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kuh...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kuh...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kuh...!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
I'm getting too old for this... How can a small wound like this be so
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
I'm getting too old for this... How can a small wound like this be so
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
I'm getting too old for this... How can a small wound like this be so
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Morgan, what are you doing?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Morgan, what are you doing?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Morgan, what are you doing?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ....My lady? How long have you been there?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ....My lady? How long have you been there?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ....My lady? How long have you been there?

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is a narcotic painkiller.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is a narcotic painkiller.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is a narcotic painkiller.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I never approved of the use of something like this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I never approved of the use of something like this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I never approved of the use of something like this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hah hah, please excuse this old man's vulgar behaviour.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hah hah, please excuse this old man's vulgar behaviour.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hah hah, please excuse this old man's vulgar behaviour.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But don't worry, my lady. I know my body best.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But don't worry, my lady. I know my body best.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But don't worry, my lady. I know my body best.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're being ridiculous. You've even got a doctor stoppage.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're being ridiculous. You've even got a doctor stoppage.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're being ridiculous. You've even got a doctor stoppage.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Stop it this instant! This is an order from your chief, Thaddeus Morgan!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Stop it this instant! This is an order from your chief, Thaddeus Morgan!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Stop it this instant! This is an order from your chief, Thaddeus Morgan!

records.m_Talk_ENG: And Water Flea's evaluation will be delayed until Agent Ferrier returns from his business trip.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And Water Flea's evaluation will be delayed until Agent Ferrier returns from his business trip.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And Water Flea's evaluation will be delayed until Agent Ferrier returns from his business trip.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Or, better yet, I will do it myself
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Or, better yet, I will do it myself
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Or, better yet, I will do it myself
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hah hah, but there's no need for the chief to participate in an entry-level evaluation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hah hah, but there's no need for the chief to participate in an entry-level evaluation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hah hah, but there's no need for the chief to participate in an entry-level evaluation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My lady... this old man will be able to go out on the field only a couple of more times.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My lady... this old man will be able to go out on the field only a couple of more times.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My lady... this old man will be able to go out on the field only a couple of more times.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've heard enough. If you mention age to me again, I'll sew your mouth up.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've heard enough. If you mention age to me again, I'll sew your mouth up.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've heard enough. If you mention age to me again, I'll sew your mouth up.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oof... That's a little scary.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oof... That's a little scary.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oof... That's a little scary.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But as you may already know, there are matters that I won't entrust to others.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But as you may already know, there are matters that I won't entrust to others.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But as you may already know, there are matters that I won't entrust to others.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This skill I inherited from Sir Burnett... I must pass on everything I know to that kid.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This skill I inherited from Sir Burnett... I must pass on everything I know to that kid.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This skill I inherited from Sir Burnett... I must pass on everything I know to that kid.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It will be the last contribution this I, who couldn't surpass him, makes to the Institution.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It will be the last contribution this I, who couldn't surpass him, makes to the Institution.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It will be the last contribution this I, who couldn't surpass him, makes to the Institution.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I haven't much time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I haven't much time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I haven't much time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So will you please listen to this old man's favour?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So will you please listen to this old man's favour?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So will you please listen to this old man's favour?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do as you please! How stubborn can a person be?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do as you please! How stubborn can a person be?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do as you please! How stubborn can a person be?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hah hah. Thank you, my lady.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hah hah. Thank you, my lady.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hah hah. Thank you, my lady.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But remember that your contributions to Prydwen will never be forgotten, Thaddeus Morgan.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But remember that your contributions to Prydwen will never be forgotten, Thaddeus Morgan.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But remember that your contributions to Prydwen will never be forgotten, Thaddeus Morgan.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Also, we promise to keep supporting you so you can spend the rest of the life in peace.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Also, we promise to keep supporting you so you can spend the rest of the life in peace.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Also, we promise to keep supporting you so you can spend the rest of the life in peace.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, if you do not want to be trapped inside a luxury nursing home, I suggest you start planning out your retirement.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, if you do not want to be trapped inside a luxury nursing home, I suggest you start planning out your retirement.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, if you do not want to be trapped inside a luxury nursing home, I suggest you start planning out your retirement.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hah hah, perhaps I should start brushing up on my gateball skills.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hah hah, perhaps I should start brushing up on my gateball skills.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hah hah, perhaps I should start brushing up on my gateball skills.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Blimey, what took you so long? I was dying of boredom in here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Blimey, what took you so long? I was dying of boredom in here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Blimey, what took you so long? I was dying of boredom in here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hah hah, sorry about that, kid Burnett.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hah hah, sorry about that, kid Burnett.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hah hah, sorry about that, kid Burnett.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How's your injured leg?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How's your injured leg?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How's your injured leg?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It could be better, but I've no problem moving it. You know how great the butler's recovery room is, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: It could be better, but I've no problem moving it. You know how great the butler's recovery room is, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: It could be better, but I've no problem moving it. You know how great the butler's recovery room is, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What a shame. If Ryan was your opponent, that kind of flattery would've worked on him.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What a shame. If Ryan was your opponent, that kind of flattery would've worked on him.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What a shame. If Ryan was your opponent, that kind of flattery would've worked on him.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But don't go around stressing your body or you'll regret it later.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But don't go around stressing your body or you'll regret it later.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But don't go around stressing your body or you'll regret it later.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, yeah? Then how about you go easy on me, eh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, yeah? Then how about you go easy on me, eh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, yeah? Then how about you go easy on me, eh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hah hah, I'll have to decline.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hah hah, I'll have to decline.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hah hah, I'll have to decline.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I hope you didn't forget your promise, Morgan? Man's gotta keep his word.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I hope you didn't forget your promise, Morgan? Man's gotta keep his word.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I hope you didn't forget your promise, Morgan? Man's gotta keep his word.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course. If you pass this test, I'll tell you everything.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course. If you pass this test, I'll tell you everything.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course. If you pass this test, I'll tell you everything.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, you'll need to know about it if you officially become an agent anyway.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, you'll need to know about it if you officially become an agent anyway.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, you'll need to know about it if you officially become an agent anyway.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But that is only if you can hit me once within the time limit.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But that is only if you can hit me once within the time limit.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But that is only if you can hit me once within the time limit.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This reminds me of the first time we met.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This reminds me of the first time we met.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This reminds me of the first time we met.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I owe you one at that time, actually.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I owe you one at that time, actually.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I owe you one at that time, actually.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But if you think I'm still the same kid, you're making a big mistake, old chap.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But if you think I'm still the same kid, you're making a big mistake, old chap.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But if you think I'm still the same kid, you're making a big mistake, old chap.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ho-oh. What a coincidence.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ho-oh. What a coincidence.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ho-oh. What a coincidence.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was also thinking about the old days, kid Burnett.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was also thinking about the old days, kid Burnett.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was also thinking about the old days, kid Burnett.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You see, it was Sir Burnett who conducted my test.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You see, it was Sir Burnett who conducted my test.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You see, it was Sir Burnett who conducted my test.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And seeing how you're here as an official agent, it must mean you gave him one hell of a punch, eh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And seeing how you're here as an official agent, it must mean you gave him one hell of a punch, eh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And seeing how you're here as an official agent, it must mean you gave him one hell of a punch, eh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hah hah, correct. I did hit him good.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hah hah, correct. I did hit him good.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hah hah, correct. I did hit him good.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...But only after 72 attempts, I managed to pull it off by ambushing him with Ryan.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...But only after 72 attempts, I managed to pull it off by ambushing him with Ryan.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...But only after 72 attempts, I managed to pull it off by ambushing him with Ryan.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, let's see how long it'll take you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, let's see how long it'll take you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, let's see how long it'll take you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you want to pass, you'd better use any means necessary. Got that, kid Burnett?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you want to pass, you'd better use any means necessary. Got that, kid Burnett?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you want to pass, you'd better use any means necessary. Got that, kid Burnett?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, you reek of alcohol...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, you reek of alcohol...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, you reek of alcohol...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oi, you still haven't managed to kick your drinking habit, have you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oi, you still haven't managed to kick your drinking habit, have you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oi, you still haven't managed to kick your drinking habit, have you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Blimey. Mum must be so happy watching over you in heaven.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Blimey. Mum must be so happy watching over you in heaven.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Blimey. Mum must be so happy watching over you in heaven.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This place is a dump! Look at all this mess!
root.m_Talk_DEU: This place is a dump! Look at all this mess!
root.m_Talk_FRA: This place is a dump! Look at all this mess!

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Move outta my way so I can start cleaning
8g
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Move outta my way so I can start cleaning
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Move outta my way so I can start cleaning
8g

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hang on, what's this?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hang on, what's this?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hang on, what's this?

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Scoff!* You're doing drugs now, too?
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Scoff!* You're doing drugs now, too?
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Scoff!* You're doing drugs now, too?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Since I was a kid, I always knew that you were a piece of trash.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Since I was a kid, I always knew that you were a piece of trash.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Since I was a kid, I always knew that you were a piece of trash.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The only reason why I'm sending you money every month is because of mum's will.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The only reason why I'm sending you money every month is because of mum's will.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The only reason why I'm sending you money every month is because of mum's will.

root.m_Talk_ENG: She asked me to forgive you and take care of you...
root.m_Talk_DEU: She asked me to forgive you and take care of you...
root.m_Talk_FRA: She asked me to forgive you and take care of you...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Answer me, you deadbeat dad!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Answer me, you deadbeat dad!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Answer me, you deadbeat dad!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is this what you were doing with the money I've been sending you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is this what you were doing with the money I've been sending you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is this what you were doing with the money I've been sending you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...*Cough, Cough!*
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...*Cough, Cough!*
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...*Cough, Cough!*

root.m_Talk_ENG: Errhm, you've become quite famous, haven't you, Roy?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Errhm, you've become quite famous, haven't you, Roy?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Errhm, you've become quite famous, haven't you, Roy?

root.m_Talk_ENG: So... are you thinking of quitting the Institution and becoming a Gauntlet player?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So... are you thinking of quitting the Institution and becoming a Gauntlet player?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So... are you thinking of quitting the Institution and becoming a Gauntlet player?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Keke... That's not that bad. Street fights are your thing.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Keke... That's not that bad. Street fights are your thing.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Keke... That's not that bad. Street fights are your thing.

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Cough!* *Cough!* <color=#ffd34c>Prydwen</color> isn't a place... for a bloke like you anyway.
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Cough!* *Cough!* <color=#ffd34c>Prydwen</color> isn't a place... for a bloke like you anyway.
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Cough!* *Cough!* <color=#ffd34c>Prydwen</color> isn't a place... for a bloke like you anyway.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
You're not qualified to take over
8g
root.m_Talk_DEU:
You're not qualified to take over
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
You're not qualified to take over
8g

root.m_Talk_ENG: Shut it! What the hell do you think you're doing?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Shut it! What the hell do you think you're doing?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Shut it! What the hell do you think you're doing?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Think you can parent me now? Why do you care what I do, huh?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Think you can parent me now? Why do you care what I do, huh?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Think you can parent me now? Why do you care what I do, huh?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, forget about it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, forget about it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, forget about it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I didn't come here to pick a fight with you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I didn't come here to pick a fight with you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I didn't come here to pick a fight with you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I just want to ask you one question.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I just want to ask you one question.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I just want to ask you one question.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I heard you were also a <color=#ffd34c>member</color> of Prydwen.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I heard you were also a <color=#ffd34c>member</color> of Prydwen.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I heard you were also a <color=#ffd34c>member</color> of Prydwen.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Did Thaddeus say that? That prick...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Did Thaddeus say that? That prick...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Did Thaddeus say that? That prick...

root.m_Talk_ENG: What the hell did you do? And what do they mean by you owing the Institution?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What the hell did you do? And what do they mean by you owing the Institution?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What the hell did you do? And what do they mean by you owing the Institution?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You didn't... betray the Institution, did you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You didn't... betray the Institution, did you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You didn't... betray the Institution, did you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Shut up! I said, shut up, Roy Burnett!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Shut up! I said, shut up, Roy Burnett!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Shut up! I said, shut up, Roy Burnett!

root.m_Talk_ENG: What does a kid like you know, huh?! None of that was my fault!
root.m_Talk_DEU: What does a kid like you know, huh?! None of that was my fault!
root.m_Talk_FRA: What does a kid like you know, huh?! None of that was my fault!

root.m_Talk_ENG: If I knew it would end like that! I'd...! I'd...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: If I knew it would end like that! I'd...! I'd...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: If I knew it would end like that! I'd...! I'd...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Gah...! *Cough!* *Cough!*
root.m_Talk_DEU: Gah...! *Cough!* *Cough!*
root.m_Talk_FRA: Gah...! *Cough!* *Cough!*

root.m_Talk_ENG: Your fault?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Your fault?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Your fault?

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Get
8g Get out... of my sight.
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Get
8g Get out... of my sight.
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Get
8g Get out... of my sight.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're nothing but the Institution's hound... You'll never believe a word I say!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're nothing but the Institution's hound... You'll never believe a word I say!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're nothing but the Institution's hound... You'll never believe a word I say!

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you're that curious to know, go ask that tosser, Thaddeus Morgan.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you're that curious to know, go ask that tosser, Thaddeus Morgan.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you're that curious to know, go ask that tosser, Thaddeus Morgan.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Sure, whatever.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Sure, whatever.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Sure, whatever.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I wasn't expecting to get a straight answer from you, anyway.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I wasn't expecting to get a straight answer from you, anyway.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I wasn't expecting to get a straight answer from you, anyway.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Take this and piss off, you deadbeat dad.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Take this and piss off, you deadbeat dad.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Take this and piss off, you deadbeat dad.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Use that money to get treatment, or to shoot up drugs and overdose. I don't give a crap anymore.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Use that money to get treatment, or to shoot up drugs and overdose. I don't give a crap anymore.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Use that money to get treatment, or to shoot up drugs and overdose. I don't give a crap anymore.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Also... this is the last bit of consideration I'm offering you as your son.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Also... this is the last bit of consideration I'm offering you as your son.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Also... this is the last bit of consideration I'm offering you as your son.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Get outta here, you stupid boy!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Get outta here, you stupid boy!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Get outta here, you stupid boy!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You think you're getting some special treatment from the Institution?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You think you're getting some special treatment from the Institution?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You think you're getting some special treatment from the Institution?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mark my words! You'll end up exactly like your grandfather, and they will bleed you dry before throwing you away!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mark my words! You'll end up exactly like your grandfather, and they will bleed you dry before throwing you away!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mark my words! You'll end up exactly like your grandfather, and they will bleed you dry before throwing you away!

root.m_Talk_ENG: With nothing in return for your services...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: With nothing in return for your services...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: With nothing in return for your services...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Blimey. The Institution is always like this.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Blimey. The Institution is always like this.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Blimey. The Institution is always like this.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Although I might be from a dysfunctional family, is this what you call being gentlemanly? Snooping around in other people's private lives?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Although I might be from a dysfunctional family, is this what you call being gentlemanly? Snooping around in other people's private lives?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Although I might be from a dysfunctional family, is this what you call being gentlemanly? Snooping around in other people's private lives?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You can stop hiding now, Morgan.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You can stop hiding now, Morgan.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You can stop hiding now, Morgan.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hah hah, you got me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hah hah, you got me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hah hah, you got me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: When did you notice I was there? Looks like your senses have gotten keener, Champion Burnett.
root.m_Talk_DEU: When did you notice I was there? Looks like your senses have gotten keener, Champion Burnett.
root.m_Talk_FRA: When did you notice I was there? Looks like your senses have gotten keener, Champion Burnett.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Shut up. We worked together long enough for me to notice your presence.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Shut up. We worked together long enough for me to notice your presence.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Shut up. We worked together long enough for me to notice your presence.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And what's with you calling me "Champion Burnett"?
root.m_Talk_DEU: And what's with you calling me "Champion Burnett"?
root.m_Talk_FRA: And what's with you calling me "Champion Burnett"?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hah hah! It's because my proud disciple just won the Gauntlet League!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hah hah! It's because my proud disciple just won the Gauntlet League!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hah hah! It's because my proud disciple just won the Gauntlet League!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Although it was a shame that you got injured by Ozymandias and had to retire during the match.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Although it was a shame that you got injured by Ozymandias and had to retire during the match.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Although it was a shame that you got injured by Ozymandias and had to retire during the match.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's a real shame, indeed... If it were me...
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's a real shame, indeed... If it were me...
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's a real shame, indeed... If it were me...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I would've avoided her attack like this!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I would've avoided her attack like this!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I would've avoided her attack like this!

root.m_Talk_ENG: And this!
root.m_Talk_DEU: And this!
root.m_Talk_FRA: And this!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You didn't follow me just to talk gibberish, did you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You didn't follow me just to talk gibberish, did you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You didn't follow me just to talk gibberish, did you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not in a good mood, so cut the crap and get to the point.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not in a good mood, so cut the crap and get to the point.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not in a good mood, so cut the crap and get to the point.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hah hah. How rude of you, young man.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hah hah. How rude of you, young man.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hah hah. How rude of you, young man.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Or do you want to me guess?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Or do you want to me guess?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Or do you want to me guess?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Am I also under <color=#ffd34c>special surveillance</color> by the Institution?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Am I also under <color=#ffd34c>special surveillance</color> by the Institution?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Am I also under <color=#ffd34c>special surveillance</color> by the Institution?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know what kind of trouble my old man caused, but...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know what kind of trouble my old man caused, but...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know what kind of trouble my old man caused, but...

root.m_Talk_ENG: if he really did betray the Institution, then they would not want me to contact him.
root.m_Talk_DEU: if he really did betray the Institution, then they would not want me to contact him.
root.m_Talk_FRA: if he really did betray the Institution, then they would not want me to contact him.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Isn't that right, Thaddeus Morgan?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Isn't that right, Thaddeus Morgan?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Isn't that right, Thaddeus Morgan?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Aren't you quick-witted? Yes, I won't deny it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Aren't you quick-witted? Yes, I won't deny it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Aren't you quick-witted? Yes, I won't deny it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Institution is both monitoring and educating you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Institution is both monitoring and educating you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Institution is both monitoring and educating you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Reason being that, to us, <color=#ffd34c>Burnetts</color> are <color=#ffd34c>special</color> beings.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Reason being that, to us, <color=#ffd34c>Burnetts</color> are <color=#ffd34c>special</color> beings.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Reason being that, to us, <color=#ffd34c>Burnetts</color> are <color=#ffd34c>special</color> beings.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And with that exceptionality follows great <color=#ffd34c>responsibility</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And with that exceptionality follows great <color=#ffd34c>responsibility</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And with that exceptionality follows great <color=#ffd34c>responsibility</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: However, the Institution has not determined if you are worthy of that responsibility yet.
root.m_Talk_DEU: However, the Institution has not determined if you are worthy of that responsibility yet.
root.m_Talk_FRA: However, the Institution has not determined if you are worthy of that responsibility yet.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Responsibility this, responsibility that... I'm so sick of that word.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Responsibility this, responsibility that... I'm so sick of that word.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Responsibility this, responsibility that... I'm so sick of that word.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Institution is always like that. What exactly am I to you all?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Institution is always like that. What exactly am I to you all?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Institution is always like that. What exactly am I to you all?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You've never told me what kind of person Grandfather was, or what my dad did to the Institution...
root.m_Talk_DEU: You've never told me what kind of person Grandfather was, or what my dad did to the Institution...
root.m_Talk_FRA: You've never told me what kind of person Grandfather was, or what my dad did to the Institution...

root.m_Talk_ENG: But you just want me to take responsibility for it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: But you just want me to take responsibility for it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: But you just want me to take responsibility for it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What do I have to do to win your trust, huh?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What do I have to do to win your trust, huh?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What do I have to do to win your trust, huh?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It seems you've hit late puberty, kid Burnett.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It seems you've hit late puberty, kid Burnett.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It seems you've hit late puberty, kid Burnett.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But I understand. I too was frustrated with the Institution once.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But I understand. I too was frustrated with the Institution once.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But I understand. I too was frustrated with the Institution once.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then, allow me to make you a proposition.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then, allow me to make you a proposition.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then, allow me to make you a proposition.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...A proposition?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...A proposition?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...A proposition?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sir, the preparations are complete.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sir, the preparations are complete.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sir, the preparations are complete.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Agent Burnett is waiting for you in Training room No. 4.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Agent Burnett is waiting for you in Training room No. 4.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Agent Burnett is waiting for you in Training room No. 4.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Phew.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Phew.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Phew.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Very well. Tell kid Burnett that I'll be there soon.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Very well. Tell kid Burnett that I'll be there soon.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Very well. Tell kid Burnett that I'll be there soon.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kuh...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kuh...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kuh...!

root.m_Talk_ENG:
I'm getting too old for this... How can a small wound like this be so
8g
root.m_Talk_DEU:
I'm getting too old for this... How can a small wound like this be so
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
I'm getting too old for this... How can a small wound like this be so
8g

root.m_Talk_ENG: Morgan, what are you doing?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Morgan, what are you doing?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Morgan, what are you doing?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ....My lady? How long have you been there?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ....My lady? How long have you been there?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ....My lady? How long have you been there?

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is a narcotic painkiller.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is a narcotic painkiller.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is a narcotic painkiller.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I never approved of the use of something like this.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I never approved of the use of something like this.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I never approved of the use of something like this.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hah hah, please excuse this old man's vulgar behaviour.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hah hah, please excuse this old man's vulgar behaviour.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hah hah, please excuse this old man's vulgar behaviour.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But don't worry, my lady. I know my body best.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But don't worry, my lady. I know my body best.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But don't worry, my lady. I know my body best.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're being ridiculous. You've even got a doctor stoppage.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're being ridiculous. You've even got a doctor stoppage.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're being ridiculous. You've even got a doctor stoppage.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Stop it this instant! This is an order from your chief, Thaddeus Morgan!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Stop it this instant! This is an order from your chief, Thaddeus Morgan!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Stop it this instant! This is an order from your chief, Thaddeus Morgan!

root.m_Talk_ENG: And Water Flea's evaluation will be delayed until Agent Ferrier returns from his business trip.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And Water Flea's evaluation will be delayed until Agent Ferrier returns from his business trip.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And Water Flea's evaluation will be delayed until Agent Ferrier returns from his business trip.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Or, better yet, I will do it myself
8g
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Or, better yet, I will do it myself
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Or, better yet, I will do it myself
8g

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hah hah, but there's no need for the chief to participate in an entry-level evaluation.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hah hah, but there's no need for the chief to participate in an entry-level evaluation.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hah hah, but there's no need for the chief to participate in an entry-level evaluation.

root.m_Talk_ENG: My lady... this old man will be able to go out on the field only a couple of more times.
root.m_Talk_DEU: My lady... this old man will be able to go out on the field only a couple of more times.
root.m_Talk_FRA: My lady... this old man will be able to go out on the field only a couple of more times.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I've heard enough. If you mention age to me again, I'll sew your mouth up.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I've heard enough. If you mention age to me again, I'll sew your mouth up.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I've heard enough. If you mention age to me again, I'll sew your mouth up.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oof... That's a little scary.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oof... That's a little scary.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oof... That's a little scary.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But as you may already know, there are matters that I won't entrust to others.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But as you may already know, there are matters that I won't entrust to others.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But as you may already know, there are matters that I won't entrust to others.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This skill I inherited from Sir Burnett... I must pass on everything I know to that kid.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This skill I inherited from Sir Burnett... I must pass on everything I know to that kid.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This skill I inherited from Sir Burnett... I must pass on everything I know to that kid.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It will be the last contribution this I, who couldn't surpass him, makes to the Institution.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It will be the last contribution this I, who couldn't surpass him, makes to the Institution.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It will be the last contribution this I, who couldn't surpass him, makes to the Institution.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I haven't much time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I haven't much time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I haven't much time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So will you please listen to this old man's favour?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So will you please listen to this old man's favour?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So will you please listen to this old man's favour?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do as you please! How stubborn can a person be?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do as you please! How stubborn can a person be?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do as you please! How stubborn can a person be?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hah hah. Thank you, my lady.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hah hah. Thank you, my lady.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hah hah. Thank you, my lady.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But remember that your contributions to Prydwen will never be forgotten, Thaddeus Morgan.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But remember that your contributions to Prydwen will never be forgotten, Thaddeus Morgan.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But remember that your contributions to Prydwen will never be forgotten, Thaddeus Morgan.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Also, we promise to keep supporting you so you can spend the rest of the life in peace.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Also, we promise to keep supporting you so you can spend the rest of the life in peace.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Also, we promise to keep supporting you so you can spend the rest of the life in peace.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, if you do not want to be trapped inside a luxury nursing home, I suggest you start planning out your retirement.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, if you do not want to be trapped inside a luxury nursing home, I suggest you start planning out your retirement.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, if you do not want to be trapped inside a luxury nursing home, I suggest you start planning out your retirement.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hah hah, perhaps I should start brushing up on my gateball skills.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hah hah, perhaps I should start brushing up on my gateball skills.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hah hah, perhaps I should start brushing up on my gateball skills.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Blimey, what took you so long? I was dying of boredom in here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Blimey, what took you so long? I was dying of boredom in here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Blimey, what took you so long? I was dying of boredom in here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hah hah, sorry about that, kid Burnett.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hah hah, sorry about that, kid Burnett.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hah hah, sorry about that, kid Burnett.

root.m_Talk_ENG: How's your injured leg?
root.m_Talk_DEU: How's your injured leg?
root.m_Talk_FRA: How's your injured leg?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It could be better, but I've no problem moving it. You know how great the butler's recovery room is, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: It could be better, but I've no problem moving it. You know how great the butler's recovery room is, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: It could be better, but I've no problem moving it. You know how great the butler's recovery room is, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What a shame. If Ryan was your opponent, that kind of flattery would've worked on him.
root.m_Talk_DEU: What a shame. If Ryan was your opponent, that kind of flattery would've worked on him.
root.m_Talk_FRA: What a shame. If Ryan was your opponent, that kind of flattery would've worked on him.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But don't go around stressing your body or you'll regret it later.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But don't go around stressing your body or you'll regret it later.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But don't go around stressing your body or you'll regret it later.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, yeah? Then how about you go easy on me, eh?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, yeah? Then how about you go easy on me, eh?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, yeah? Then how about you go easy on me, eh?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hah hah, I'll have to decline.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hah hah, I'll have to decline.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hah hah, I'll have to decline.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I hope you didn't forget your promise, Morgan? Man's gotta keep his word.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I hope you didn't forget your promise, Morgan? Man's gotta keep his word.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I hope you didn't forget your promise, Morgan? Man's gotta keep his word.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Of course. If you pass this test, I'll tell you everything.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Of course. If you pass this test, I'll tell you everything.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Of course. If you pass this test, I'll tell you everything.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well, you'll need to know about it if you officially become an agent anyway.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well, you'll need to know about it if you officially become an agent anyway.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well, you'll need to know about it if you officially become an agent anyway.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But that is only if you can hit me once within the time limit.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But that is only if you can hit me once within the time limit.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But that is only if you can hit me once within the time limit.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This reminds me of the first time we met.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This reminds me of the first time we met.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This reminds me of the first time we met.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I owe you one at that time, actually.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I owe you one at that time, actually.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I owe you one at that time, actually.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But if you think I'm still the same kid, you're making a big mistake, old chap.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But if you think I'm still the same kid, you're making a big mistake, old chap.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But if you think I'm still the same kid, you're making a big mistake, old chap.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ho-oh. What a coincidence.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ho-oh. What a coincidence.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ho-oh. What a coincidence.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I was also thinking about the old days, kid Burnett.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I was also thinking about the old days, kid Burnett.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I was also thinking about the old days, kid Burnett.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You see, it was Sir Burnett who conducted my test.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You see, it was Sir Burnett who conducted my test.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You see, it was Sir Burnett who conducted my test.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And seeing how you're here as an official agent, it must mean you gave him one hell of a punch, eh?
root.m_Talk_DEU: And seeing how you're here as an official agent, it must mean you gave him one hell of a punch, eh?
root.m_Talk_FRA: And seeing how you're here as an official agent, it must mean you gave him one hell of a punch, eh?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hah hah, correct. I did hit him good.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hah hah, correct. I did hit him good.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hah hah, correct. I did hit him good.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...But only after 72 attempts, I managed to pull it off by ambushing him with Ryan.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...But only after 72 attempts, I managed to pull it off by ambushing him with Ryan.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...But only after 72 attempts, I managed to pull it off by ambushing him with Ryan.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now, let's see how long it'll take you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now, let's see how long it'll take you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now, let's see how long it'll take you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you want to pass, you'd better use any means necessary. Got that, kid Burnett?
